heading: Make the Business, Not You, the Asset
content: Shift loyalty from “you” to “the business” with documented processes and relationship handoffs.

heading: Turn Results into a Sellable Story
content: Package a believable growth story backed by systems, KPIs, and clean financials buyers can trust.

heading: Prepare for Buyer Scrutiny Early
content: Anticipate due-diligence questions and remove red flags before they kill value.

heading: Exit Cleanly, Without Chaos
content: Plan a smooth handoff of control, assets, and people so value survives the closing date.
